home.choosePlanningMode: Choose how you'd like to plan your date
home.collaborativeDesc: Send a proposal and plan together
home.proposalSentDesc: Your date proposal has been sent successfully.

landing.heroSubtitle: Thoughtful date planning for meaningful moments.
landing.heroSubtitle2: Discover places, align preferences, create memories.
landing.noCreditCard: No credit card required • Free to start
landing.featuresSubtitle: Thoughtfully designed features that bring ease to date planning
landing.feature1Desc: Intelligent recommendations based on your preferences and compatibility. Find places that resonate with both of you.
landing.feature2Desc: Collaborate in real-time to find the perfect venue. Share preferences and discover places you'll both enjoy.
landing.feature3Desc: From discovery to invitation in just a few taps. Track your dates and create lasting memories together.
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Getting started is quick and effortless
landing.step1Desc: Tell us what matters to you — cuisine, atmosphere, budget, and more. Our system learns your unique style to find venues that truly fit.
landing.step2Desc: Our system analyzes both your preferences to find places you'll both love. See compatibility insights and curated recommendations.
landing.step3Desc: Send invitations, coordinate schedules, and bring your plans to life. Create meaningful experiences and cherished memories together.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join a community that values intention and connection. Start planning dates that matter.

onboarding.screen1Desc: Let AI find the ideal locations tailored to your preferences and mood. From cozy cafés to scenic viewpoints.
onboarding.screen2Desc: Find hidden gems and popular destinations in your neighborhood. Get personalized recommendations based on your location.
onboarding.screen3Desc: Invite friends, share experiences, and plan group dates together. Make every moment memorable with the people you love.

myFriends.title: My Friends
myFriends.inviteMoreDesc: Connect with more people to discover amazing dates together

friends.inviteToJoin: Invite friends to join your date adventure
friends.uninvitedDesc: Friend removed from your date plans
friends.friendInvitedDesc: Friend will receive your date recommendations
friends.inviteToVybe: Invite your friends to join VybePulse!
friends.shareReferral: Share your referral link and discover amazing dates together
friends.linkCopiedDesc: Your referral link has been copied to clipboard.
friends.groupRecommendations: They'll get recommendations that work for the group

myVenuesPage.title: My Venues
myVenuesPage.startExploring: Start exploring and add venues to your favorites!
myVenuesPage.adjustSearch: Try adjusting your search terms to find more venues.

preferences.whatVibe: What vibe are you going for?
preferences.chooseAtmosphere: Choose the perfect atmosphere for your date
preferences.whatToDo: What do you want to do together?
preferences.howEntertained: How do you like to be entertained?
preferences.setDefaultLocation: Set your default location for venue searches
preferences.locationError: Unable to get your location. Please try again or enter an address manually.
preferences.locationNotSupported: Geolocation is not supported by your browser
preferences.letUsKnow: Let us know your dietary needs
preferences.accessibilityFeatures: What accessibility features do you need?
preferences.prefsSavedDesc: Your preferences have been saved successfully.

smartPlanning.signInToUse: Please sign in to use the Smart Date Planner.

settings.title: Account Settings
settings.name: Name
settings.changeEmailDesc: You will receive a confirmation email at the new address.
settings.confirmationSentDesc: Please confirm the change via the link in the email sent to {{email}}.
settings.changePasswordDesc: Choose a secure password with at least 6 characters.
settings.passwordChangedDesc: Your password has been updated successfully.
settings.pushActive: You receive notifications for new invitations
settings.pushInactive: Get real-time updates on your device
settings.pauseDescActive: Temporarily pause your account. Your data is preserved, but your profile becomes invisible.
settings.pauseDescPaused: Your account is paused. Your profile is invisible to others and you won't receive invitations.
settings.pausedToastDesc: Your profile is now invisible to others. You can reactivate anytime.
settings.reactivatedToastDesc: Welcome back! Your profile is active again.
settings.dataExportDesc: Download all your stored data as a JSON file (GDPR Art. 20).
settings.dataExportedDesc: Your data has been downloaded as a JSON file.
settings.dangerZoneDesc: This action cannot be undone. All your data will be permanently deleted.
settings.deleteConfirmDesc: This action permanently deletes your account and all associated data.
settings.deleteRequestedDesc: Your account will be deleted shortly. You will now be logged out.
settings.languageDesc: Choose the display language of the app.
